## Changed contracts

List affected workspace, skill, role, manifest, CLI, schema, or release contracts.

## Verification

List exact commands and results.

- [ ] Ruff lint passed.
- [ ] Ruff format check passed.
- [ ] Unit tests and pytest passed.
- [ ] Upstream validation passed.
- [ ] `upstream-public` safety scan passed.
- [ ] Release build and reproducibility check passed when applicable.

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] I reviewed the diff for secrets, PII, restricted markers, local paths, and unsafe files.
- [ ] This change contains no real legal matters, source documents, memory, logs, or generated legal work.
- [ ] Fixtures are explicitly synthetic and minimal.
- [ ] New network, dependency, write, hook, rule, or release behavior is documented.

## Documentation and release impact

- [ ] Documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated, or no update is required.
- [ ] Compatibility and migration impact are documented.
- [ ] I identified whether this is a breaking change.
